label: Apparel requirement
description: Specifies body part coverage, required tags, allowed tags, and required defs for a pawn apparel requirement.

bodyPartGroupsMatchAny.label: Body part groups (match any)
bodyPartGroupsMatchAny.description: The apparel must cover at least one of these body part groups.

requiredTags.label: Required tags
requiredTags.description: Apparel must have at least one of these tags to satisfy the requirement.

allowedTags.label: Allowed tags
allowedTags.description: Apparel with any of these tags is allowed to satisfy the requirement when no required tag matches.

requiredDefs.label: Required defs
requiredDefs.description: Specific ThingDefs that are always allowed to satisfy the requirement.

groupLabel.label: Group label
groupLabel.description: Label shown for this requirement group in the UI.
